title: Extent of reaction (ξ)
definition: One number, $\xi$ (in moles), that says how far a reaction has run. Every species' amount is a straight line in it: $n_i = n_{i,0} + \nu_i\,\xi$, with $\nu_i$ negative for reactants and positive for products. Stoichiometry, limiting reagents, leftovers, ICE tables, and reaction rates ($d\xi/dt$) are all just views of this single ledger.
